Configuration files and build scripts for various Pebble firmware releases, including manufacturing tests.


## Files
- **[10121030_baconator.json](10121030_baconator.json.md)**: Configuration for the Pebble Firmware (Baconator) release, including board support and file mappings.
- **[20121019_birkenstock.json](20121019_birkenstock.json.md)**: Configuration for EV2-4 Pebble Firmware release, detailing file paths and firmware metadata.
- **[20121114_chicken_nugget.json](20121114_chicken_nugget.json.md)**: Configuration for the Pebble Firmware "Chicken Nugget" release, detailing board support and file paths.
- **[20121206_double_down.json](20121206_double_down.json.md)**: Configuration for the Pebble Firmware "Double Down" release, detailing board support and file mappings.
- **[20121220_egg_mcmuffin.json](20121220_egg_mcmuffin.json.md)**: Configuration for the Pebble Firmware release "Egg McMuffin" with file paths and board details.
- **[20130123_grand_slam.json](20130123_grand_slam.json.md)**: Configuration for Pebble Firmware (Grand Slam) with file paths and build instructions.
- **[20130206_happy_meal.json](20130206_happy_meal.json.md)**: Configuration for Pebble Firmware release, including file paths and board specifications.
- **[beta5.sh](beta5.sh.md)**: Build script for the beta5 release of pebble-firmware, targeting multiple board versions.
- **[beta7-pre-rc.sh](beta7-pre-rc.sh.md)**: Build script for the beta7-pre-rc release of pebble-firmware, checking prerequisites and compiling firmware.
- **[happy_meal.sh](happy_meal.sh.md)**: Build script for the Happy-Meal firmware, managing build and distribution tasks.
- **[in-n-out.sh](in-n-out.sh.md)**: A Bash script for building and packaging firmware for the Pebble device, requiring TINTIN_HOME to be set.
- **[kiwiburger.sh](kiwiburger.sh.md)**: Build script for the Kiwiburger release in the Pebble firmware project.
- **[litre-o-cola.sh](litre-o-cola.sh.md)**: Build script for the Litre-O-Cola firmware targeting multiple board versions.
- **[mcrib.sh](mcrib.sh.md)**: Build script for the McRib firmware release, targeting multiple board configurations.
- **[release.py](release.py.md)**: Automates the release process for Pebble firmware, including building, copying, and archiving files.
- **[robert_mfg_release.sh](robert_mfg_release.sh.md)**: A Bash script for building and packaging firmware and scripts for manufacturing testing of Robert devices.
- **[silk_mfg_release.sh](silk_mfg_release.sh.md)**: A Bash script for building and packaging firmware and scripts for Silk manufacturing testing.
